Khavatari Kashu:
Oh, I am almost forgot to tell you about the Kasha Orc Divine Punishment. Don't be alarmed by the name, it's just what they call it.
The Kasha Orc Divine Punishment is a defense against intruders in this secret base. If you start disturbing them, the Kasha Orc Divine Punishment will be used periodically.
It's best not to get hit, it's quite powerful. There is a way around it, there is an area where you can avoid the punishment. I'm calling it Akkan's Protection. You can escape the punishment by going to that area.
Looks like we'll be ready for battle soon. Are you ready?
